response.overview: 26 Pahalgam Files takes a deep, unfiltered look at the massacre that claimed 26 innocent lives. Through the voices of those left behind, this documentary uncovers what truly happened, how the events unfolded, and the lasting impact on families who continue to live with the loss. More than just a retelling, this is a tribute to the lives lost, to the memories that remain, and to the resilience of those who continue to carry their stories forward.
response.tagline: Detailed stories of the families in Pahalgam Attack
response.title: 26 Pahalgam Files
